explicit_non_goals: Hermes does not own or mutate Law Firm OS product code.
Claude Code review does not replace human approval.
Planning artifacts do not count as production implementation by themselves.
No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data may be used.

acceptance_risks.blocked_claim_rule: Any claim that RP00 completion authorizes later RP implementation without its own tests, Hermes evidence, Claude review, and inspection is blocked.
Any autonomous AI write path into production data, production deploys, or human approval records is forbidden.
A subphase cannot be production_ready merely because a packet exists; local commands and review or deferral evidence must be attached.
Hermes may validate evidence, but product source of truth remains this Law Firm OS repo.

contract_shell.purpose: Create the future Product Constitution And AI Control Plane contract shape for ProductContract, AIControlRule, HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, and BlockedClaim.

schema_expectations.identifier_policy: Every entity carries a stable id, tenant_id where tenant-scoped, lifecycle status, created_at, updated_at, and audit_event_ref where it can affect product state.
schema_expectations.tenant_boundary: Tenant-scoped records must fail closed when actor tenant_id and resource tenant_id differ.
schema_expectations.matter_trace: Matter references are nullable only for firm-level control-plane records; client, document, finance, or AI output records must carry Matter trace when applicable.
schema_expectations.no_real_data: Contract examples and fixtures are synthetic-only until approved migration or pilot phases.

entity_contracts.name: ProductContract
entity_contracts.purpose: Versioned product constitution record binding Law Firm OS scope, module ownership, tenant requirements, and acceptance gates.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: ProductContract cannot authorize production mutation without Hermes evidence, Claude review triage, and human acceptance or explicit next-goal boundary.

entity_contracts.name: AIControlRule
entity_contracts.purpose: Rule describing what AI agents may read, draft, recommend, or never do inside Law Firm OS implementation and runtime workflows.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: AIControlRule must forbid autonomous production data writes, approval impersonation, and completion claims without closeout evidence.

entity_contracts.name: HermesGate
entity_contracts.purpose: Product-side description of the Hermes evidence gate for commands, changed files, blocked claims, requirement refs, and verdicts.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: HermesGate records evidence only; it never owns product source code or grants production authority.

entity_contracts.name: ClaudeReviewGate
entity_contracts.purpose: Read-only cross-validation gate recording model, effort, files reviewed, findings, verdict, and finding routing.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: ClaudeReviewGate cannot replace human approval and cannot mutate files during required review.

entity_contracts.name: HumanApproval
entity_contracts.purpose: Non-delegable human decision record for sensitive closeout, production mutation, finance action, external sharing, and client-facing output.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: HumanApproval must be recorded by a human actor and cannot be synthesized by AI, Hermes, or Claude.

entity_contracts.name: BlockedClaim
entity_contracts.purpose: Fail-closed record for unsafe claims, missing evidence, validation theater, boundary confusion, or unauthorized AI authority.
entity_contracts.sensitive_action_policy: BlockedClaim P0/P1 records block production_ready until fixed and revalidated.

tenant_requirement_contracts.acceptance: tenant_id가 발급되고 기본 정책이 자동 생성된다.
최소 1명 이상의 tenant owner가 존재해야 한다.
정책 변경은 즉시 신규 세션에 적용된다.
신규 tenant 생성 시 region을 선택할 수 있다.
Enterprise tenant는 dedicated option을 선택할 수 있다.
삭제 요청 후 보존기간 내 복구 가능하다.

narrative_decision_accounting.acceptance: The plan explicitly accounts for: 제품 우선 포지션, 배포방식, 회계 범위, 전자세금계산서, DMS migration, 이메일 정책, AI 모델, HWP, 정산정책, 인건비 배부, 개인정보 보존, 권한정책, 선례관리, 외부공유.
narrative_decision_accounting.decision_policy: Each term must be preserved before implementation starts and routed to a target RP or explicit blocked claim before dependent RP closeout.

type_shape_definition.purpose: Define field types, stable identifiers, enums, references, and ownership metadata for the RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane contract shape.
type_shape_definition.non_goal: These field shapes, primitive types, enum registries, and reference rules are contract-level metadata for future implementation anchors; they are not a runtime model, ORM schema, database migration, or production persistence layer.

lifecycle_gate_definition.purpose: Lock entry, review, approval, blocked, and closeout states for plan authoring, AI implementation handoff, Hermes validation, Claude review, human approval, and blocked-claim handling.
lifecycle_gate_definition.non_goal: These lifecycle gates are contract-level control-plane metadata. They are not a workflow engine, runtime scheduler, production deploy automation, or substitute for human approval.

human_approval_policy.reason: RP00.P00.M03.S01 defines lifecycle metadata only and does not perform production mutation or client-facing behavior.

matter_first_trace_rules.purpose: State how RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane records remain tenant-scoped and Matter-traceable when workflows touch client, document, finance, or AI-output data.
matter_first_trace_rules.non_goal: These trace rules are contract-level metadata. They are not real Matter records, DMS records, billing records, migrations, production data access, or a permission evaluator.

trace_fields.required_when: workflow touches client, document, finance, external-share, portal, or client-facing AI output data
workflow touches client-owned data before Matter is resolved

matter_id_required_when: contract amendment is scoped to a specific Matter
acceptance evidence includes client, document, finance, or AI-output data
rule authorizes or blocks Matter-specific retrieval
gate validates document, billing, portal, or AI-output behavior

tenant_id_required_when: review packet includes tenant-scoped synthetic fixtures
review packet includes client, document, finance, external-share, portal, or AI-output behavior
matter_id_required_when: review packet includes Matter-scoped synthetic fixtures
review packet includes client, document, finance, or AI-output behavior
approval concerns finance mutation, external share, portal release, or Matter-specific override
blocked claim is caused by client, document, finance, or AI-output context
blocked claim routes a missing Matter trace

failure_modes.handling: record BlockedClaim and fail closed before production_ready
deny, record audit event, and block closeout until fixed
block DMS-dependent claim and route to DMS/Matter owner
remove fixture, rotate any exposed secret if applicable, and rerun evidence

permission_audit_baseline_definition.purpose: Record the minimum permission decision and audit evidence required before Product Constitution And AI Control Plane behavior can run.
permission_audit_baseline_definition.non_goal: This baseline is contract-level metadata. It is not a permission evaluator, audit ledger implementation, security-trimming runtime, production authorization service, human approval record, production mutation approval, or RP00 completion authorization.

minimum_permission_decisions.decision: actor tenant_id must match target tenant_id or fail closed
actor role, system actor, or explicit non-user automation scope must be known before behavior runs
target resource tenant_id, Matter trace applicability, and owner module must be known before behavior runs
explicit deny, ethical wall, blocked claim, missing context, or cross-tenant mismatch overrides any allow
production mutation, finance mutation, external sharing, client-facing AI output, or P0/P1 closeout must require non-delegable human approval
missing permission context, missing audit context, or missing Matter trace records a BlockedClaim instead of allowing behavior

failure_modes.handling: block behavior, record BlockedClaim, and rerun H00 evidence
block closeout until append-only audit reference is recorded or explicit non-applicability is justified
deny, record audit event, and block production_ready
deny and block production_ready until non-delegable human approval is recorded
block search, analytics, and AI retrieval claims until trimming evidence exists

synthetic_only_fixture_policy.purpose: State that Product Constitution And AI Control Plane examples use fake tenants, users, matters, documents, financial values, and AI outputs only.
synthetic_only_fixture_policy.non_goal: This fixture policy is contract-level metadata. It is not a migration, anonymization approval, real-data sampling workflow, production seed, or permission to import client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.

required_fake_markers: content is placeholder text with no privileged or client facts
no client legal advice is represented
source_context_ref points to synthetic fixture only

redaction_and_detection_requirements: fixtures must not contain real names, phone numbers, addresses, registration numbers, bank accounts, case numbers, email threads, legal advice, secrets, or credentials
any suspected real data creates a P0 blocked claim and removes the fixture from closeout evidence
synthetic fixture examples must stay small, local, and deterministic

failure_modes.handling: remove fixture, record BlockedClaim, rerun H00 evidence, and do not close production_ready until clean
remove fixture, treat as secret incident, rotate if applicable, and rerun validation
block closeout until fixture carries explicit synthetic marker and allowed namespace
replace with rounded illustrative value and source synthetic_fixture
block import and require explicit review before any external fixture source can be considered
